title: Pre-release access list for: Fire and rescue incident statistics: England, year ending June 2025
body: "Pre-release access list for: Fire and rescue incident statistics: England, year ending June 2025  National Statistics published at 9.30am on 23 October 2025  Ministerial responsibility for Fire moved from the Home Office to the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government (MHCLG) on 1 April 2025. Staff moved on 1 July 2025 with some systems to be transitioned subsequently.  1. MHCLG   Secretary of State for Housing, Communities and Local Government Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State (Minister for Building Safety, Fire and Democracy) Special Advisers (4)  Permanent Secretary   Senior Press Officer, Building Safety and Fire Functions, Press Office (3)  Head of Profession for Statistics  Deputy Head of Profession for Statistics  Director General, Building, Resilience and Fire Deputy Director, Building, Resilience and Fire Analysis  Director, Fire Policy  Head of Fire Strategy and Reform Unit Policy Lead, Fire Strategy and Reform Unit (2) Head of National Resilience and Fire Safety Unit Policy leads, National Resilience and Fire Safety Unit (3) Policy lead, Fire Funding (1)   In addition, Private Secretaries in the Ministers’ and Special Advisers’ Private Offices will have access to pre-release figures for handling arrangements. "
